failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result. It treated two prices above 233.90 as if they were below the threshold, producing an incorrect final answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The tool call at index 3 returned two matching items priced $272.33 and $237.48, both above $233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
